title: Inventory learning assessment data sources for low-income countries
outcome: A dated source inventory separating international assessments, national assessments, irregular surveys, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, assessment type, sample size, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit data-quality tier assignments.

title: Estimate learning loss for at least two low-income countries
outcome: A reproducible learning loss estimation for at least two low-income countries using available assessment data, with explicit data-quality tiers and uncertainty bounds.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with estimation methodology and data checks.
validation_method: Replicator reruns estimation with alternative data subsets and confirms loss estimates within reported uncertainty range.
done_condition: Each country estimate includes data-quality tier, uncertainty bounds, and documentation of assessment comparability issues with replication confirmed.

title: Track learning recovery from post-pandemic assessment rounds
outcome: A recovery tracking analysis comparing sequential post-pandemic assessment rounds to determine whether learning gaps are closing, stable, or widening.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with recovery trajectory analysis.
validation_method: Replicator confirms that recovery calculations account for cohort differences and confirms trajectory direction with alternative methods.
done_condition: Recovery analysis includes at least two post-pandemic assessment time points with explicit cohort-difference caveats and replication confirmed.

title: Define data-quality tiers for learning loss evidence
outcome: A tiered classification system for learning loss evidence quality, from tier-1 longitudinal comparable assessments to tier-4 reconstructed or modeled estimates.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with data-quality tier definitions and country assignments.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms tier definitions are well-specified and country assignments are justified by documented methodology.
done_condition: Data-quality tier system is defined with at least three tiers, each with explicit criteria, and all country estimates are assigned to tiers.

title: Red-team over-precise and defeatist learning loss communication
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying where learning loss estimates could be presented with false precision, stigmatize affected cohorts, or justify harmful education policies.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every learning loss estimate includes explicit uncertainty communication, non-stigmatization language, and blocks claims not supported by the data-quality tier.

title: Check whether learning loss outputs match education ministry decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether learning loss estimates would change any real education remediation decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-stigmatization safeguards, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
